name: Lal Shorve Vala Murgh- Chicken & Spicy Red Sauce - India
recipeIngredient: 4 1/2 lbs chicken pieces, cut into servings
14 cloves garlic, or more to taste, chopped
1/2 teaspoon cayenne pepper, or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle chicken lightly with salt and black pepper and set aside.
2. Blend garlic, ginger, and 3 tablespoons water into a paste.
3. Heat oil in a wide nonstick pan over medium-high heat.
4. Add asafetida to the hot oil.
5. After a few seconds, add cumin seeds.
6. Wait 10 seconds before adding cinnamon, cardamom, cloves, and red chilies.
7. Stir and then add the garlic and ginger paste.
8. Fry for 2 minutes.
9. Add chicken pieces, turmeric, and cayenne pepper.
10. Cook until chicken is fully cooked, about 5-7 minutes.
11. Add chopped tomatoes, potatoes, 1 1/4 cups water, and salt.
12. Bring to a boil, cover, and reduce heat to low.
13. Simmer gently for 25-30 minutes, or until potatoes are tender.
14. Remove any remaining spices before serving.
